name: rf-cdp-automation
description: RF segment: social + messenger automation. Ported from US modules/automation (step orchestrator + channel adapters, law-agnostic). The US TCPA messenger gate is rebuilt as a 152-FZ / 'О рекламе' marketing-messaging consent gate wired to the consent-ledger. Real Telegram/VK adapters are a follow-up; the in-memory dry-run path is verified.
